docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PROTEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY SCHEREK, ROXANE THOMPSON, DEANNA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-03-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-03-2017 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DIANNE PEEBLES. PLAINTIFF ROXANE SCHEREK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DEANNA THOMPSON IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DIANNE PEEBLES; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHEREK, ROXANE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THOMPSON, DEANNA $440.19 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $440.19 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCHEREK, ROXANE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-03-2017 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $641.42 FILED BY SCHEREK, ROXANE AS TO DEFENDANT THOMPSON, DEANNA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-03-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-10-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT THOMPSON, DEANNA
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 5/8/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER-NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
